user.title: Tuya BYO
user.description: Enter Tuya IoT Cloud credentials. Tuya BYO uses the cloud only to retrieve local keys and device models; control is local.

reconfigure.title: Update Tuya BYO
reconfigure.description: Re-query Tuya Cloud with the same credentials to refresh the DP mapping for your devices (e.g. to pick up swing/eco/LED controls that weren't detected before).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Tuya Cloud.
